_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 2 tumor suppressor protein is expressed in oligodendrocytes and regulates cell proliferation and process formation.

_contextSnippet: to 15% in schwannoma cells (RT4)...Only 26% of control RT4 cells showed no projections, but 53% of Merlin overexpressing RT4 cells failed to build processes
details: NF2 overexpression reduced cell proliferation by approximately 15% and significantly decreased process formation (53% of cells showed no projections vs 26% in controls)
